summary: Run the first FFT-aware Ramsey/T2star scout on image231924_c01 using the weak-pi pODMR center.
scientific_rationale: c01 passed strong-pi alignment screening and weak-pi pODMR gave a usable center at 3.8758666667 GHz. The project objective now requires T2star and 13C evidence. A Ramsey tau sweep with an intentional 2 MHz detuning and an 8 us span can estimate T2star and provide an FFT view while avoiding aliasing of the expected ~0.38-0.40 MHz 13C sideband around the carrier.
comparison_targets: NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE Ramsey FFT guardrail: choose det, tau span, and point count together
expected_evidence: terminal Ramsey bridge result with savedexperiment path
raw/readout-aware Ramsey/T2star plot and FFT analysis
explicit T2star and 13C conclusion status: supported, candidate-only, or unresolved
success_criteria: bridge queue idle before submission and pre-enqueue advisory has no hard blockers
acquisition completes 51 tau points over 0..8 us
analysis can assess decay envelope and FFT sidebands without aliasing the 2 MHz carrier plus expected 13C sideband
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
verifier or pre-enqueue advisory reports hard blockers
advisory per-average tracking window exceeds current cap unless parameters are adjusted
auto-align counts collapse or bridge execution fails before data acquisition
bridge_action: execute auto__ramsey tau sweep via managed batch path

target.seed_source: terminal weak-pi pODMR saved scan position 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-mw_freq-2026-05-12-004529.mat

planned_measurement.analysis_plan: raw export, normalized Ramsey plot, envelope/FFT analysis; no automatic bridge fit
